G820.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5092 (τιμή);
G820.kjv_def: despised, without honour, less honourable (comparative degree)

G811.derivation: adverb from the same as G810 (ἀσωτία);

G866.kjv_def: without covetousness, not greedy of filthy lucre

G855.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G5316 (φαίνω);

G841.strongs_def: self-satisfaction, i.e. (abstractly) contentedness, or (concretely) a competence

G863.strongs_def: an intensive form of , to go); to send forth, in various applications (as follow)
G863.kjv_def: cry, forgive, forsake, lay aside, leave, let (alone, be, go, have), omit, put (send) away, remit, suffer, yield up

G884.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G5483 (χαρίζομαι);

G848.strongs_def: self (in some oblique case or reflexively, relation)
G848.kjv_def: her (own), (of) him(-self), his (own), of it, thee, their (own), them(-selves), they

G880.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5456 (φωνή);
G880.strongs_def: voiceless, i.e. mute (by nature or choice); figuratively, unmeaning

G878.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5424 (φρήν);
G878.strongs_def: properly, mindless, i.e. stupid, (by implication) ignorant, (specially) egotistic, (practically) rash, or (morally) unbelieving

G870.derivation: adverb from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5401 (φόβος);

G873.strongs_def: to set off by boundary, i.e. (figuratively) limit, exclude, appoint, etc.

G858.derivation: from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and (in the sense of a stone as stubbing the foot);

G875.strongs_def: to froth at the mouth (in epilepsy)

G853.strongs_def: to render unapparent, i.e. (actively) consume (becloud), or (passively) disappear (be destroyed)

G865.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5358 (φιλάγαθος);
G865.kjv_def: despiser of those that are good

G816.derivation: from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a particle of union) and (to stretch);
G816.kjv_def: behold earnestly (stedfastly), fasten (eyes), look (earnestly, stedfastly, up stedfastly), set eyes

G823.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and the base of G5114 (τομώτερος);
G823.strongs_def: uncut, i.e. (by implication) indivisible (an "atom" of time)

G857.derivation: from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5339 (φείδομαι);

G824.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5117 (τόπος);
G824.strongs_def: out of place, i.e. (figuratively) improper, injurious, wicked

G827.strongs_def: a ray of light, i.e. (by implication) radiance, dawn

G890.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5543 (χρηστός);

G818.strongs_def: to render infamous, i.e. (by implication) contemn or maltreat
G818.kjv_def: despise, dishonour, suffer shame, entreat shamefully

G808.strongs_def: an indecency; by implication, the pudenda

G831.derivation: from a compound of G846 (αὐτός) and an obsolete (a worker);
G831.strongs_def: to act of oneself, i.e. (figuratively) dominate

G891.derivation: akin to G206 (ἄκρον) (through the idea of a terminus);
G891.strongs_def: (of time) until or (of place) up to
G891.kjv_def: as far as, for, in(-to), till, (even, un-)to, until, while

G856.derivation: from a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and the base of G1476 (ἑδραῖος);

G862.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G5351 (φθείρω);

G896.strongs_def: Baal, a Phœnician deity (used as a symbol of idolatry)

G801.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G4908 (συνετός);

G802.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G4934 (συντίθεμαι);

G830.derivation: from G846 (αὐτός) and the same as G140 (αἱρετίζω);
G830.kjv_def: of own accord, willing of self

G815.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5043 (τέκνον);

G879.derivation: from a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and G5258 (ὕπνος);
G879.strongs_def: properly, to become awake, i.e. (by implication) to drop (off) in slumber

G804.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and sphallo (to "fail");

G852.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5316 (φαίνω);

G843.derivation: from G846 (αὐτός) and a derivative or G2632 (κατακρίνω);

G893.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5579 (ψεῦδος);

G847.derivation: genitive (i.e. possessive) of G846 (αὐτός), used as an adverb of location;

G895.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5590 (ψυχή);

G846.derivation: from the particle (perhaps akin to the base of G109 (ἀήρ) through the idea of a baffling wind) (backward);
G846.strongs_def: the reflexive pronoun self, used (alone or in the comparative G1438 (ἑαυτοῦ)) of the third person , and (with the proper personal pronoun) of the other persons
G846.kjv_def: her, it(-self), one, the other, (mine) own, said, (self-), the) same, ((him-, my-, thy- )self, (your-)selves, she, that, their(-s), them(-selves), there(-at, - by, -in, -into, -of, -on, -with), they, (these) things, this (man), those, together, very, which
G846.usage: their(318x), he(252x), her(242x), they(121x), same(80x), himself(58x)
